title: Giant Plane Wreck
description: Adds a giant plane wreck to the forest and plains biome
body:
**This mod adds a giant plane wreck to the Forest and Plains biomes, completely overgrown and destroyed.**

![Plane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01d00d99b416c5c5bdf5bfe21cc688581bbbaaed.jpeg)



- The plane still contains some valuable goods and hidden secrets.
- Details like broken wings, scattered debris, and interior elements make the wreck feel more realistic and immersive.
  
![Broken Wing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54dbc900669e0d7b72dc58bc6c515c52fb42a5bc.jpeg)

- Under the passenger seats, a small cargo area holds some additional items.
- Features a detailed cockpit

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01bf09a8e792008821a93fec6b89d75b959f6ba6.jpeg)
  
**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
